$comment: Character-progression pack (prefix pg.): level-milestone cards, the Level 300 feature, the return-from-injury comeback report, and the campaign-completion career retrospective. Follows 010-core.json format exactly; read-side only — the events these voice are display projections of folded XP/injury facts, never fold inputs.

1960s: Experience is the one part no supplier stocks.
The old hands say you earn your craft one Sunday at a time.
1990s: The engineers grade everything now, and the driver's file keeps thickening.
Careers are databases these days, and this one's entries keep compounding.
2010s: The performance analysts call it accumulated adaptive capacity. The garage calls it knowing what you're doing.
Every debrief adds a line; the file is becoming a book.
smgp: THE METER FILLS. THE DRIVER GROWS.
ANOTHER RANK ON THE BIG LADDER.
default: Craft accumulates quietly, then all at once it is obvious.
Nobody hands out experience; it is collected the hard way.
The paddock keeps its own ledger of who is learning fastest.

1960s: The garage kept the seat warm the only way it knows: by racing without him and hating it.
Doctors' clearance in hand, gloves on, no ceremony.
2010s: The medical delegate signed off, the sim work is done, and the timing screens will say the rest.
Fitness protocols cleared, the comeback begins where it stopped.
smgp: THE SEAT REMEMBERS. THE GRID TAKES NOTE.
BACK FROM THE MEDICAL BAY, STRAIGHT TO THE FIGHT.
default: Racing waits for no one, but a grid still notices who walks back in.
The hardest lap of a comeback is the first one.
A return date is a promise kept.

1960s: The annuals will need a new chapter, and perhaps a new spine.
They will argue about this career in clubrooms for years.
2010s: The retrospective packages are already cut; the numbers hold up under any edit.
Legacy debates start now, and the statistics arrive armed.
smgp: SEVENTEEN SEASONS. ONE NAME ON THE CABINET.
THE FINAL FLAG FALLS ON A FULL CAREER.
default: The record book closes gently on a career that filled it.
What remains now is the retelling.

templates.headline: {subject} climbs the development ladder[[?milestone: to grade {milestone}]]
templates.deck: Records desk, season {season}: the career file thickens
templates.summary: {subject}'s accumulated career development reached a new grade[[?venue: after {venue}]].

sections.lead: The records desk notes a quiet milestone[[?venue: out of {venue}]]: {subject}'s career development file has reached a new grade[[?milestone: — {milestone} on the 300-step ladder]]. These numbers are earned in race trim — expected finishes beaten, teammates measured, hard Sundays banked.
sections.close: The file stays open. The next grade is already being earned.

templates.headline: How {subject} keeps compounding[[?milestone: — grade {milestone} and climbing]]
templates.summary: A development feature on {subject} reaching a career development milestone.

sections.lead: Ask the engineers what changed and they will not point at the car. {subject} has reached a development milestone[[?milestone: — grade {milestone}]] — and the gains show up where data does not: braking references remembered, restarts anticipated, tyres asked politely instead of told.
sections.stats: The steps get steeper from here[[?milestone: — grade {milestone} of 300 already banked]][[?team: ; {team} knows exactly what it is holding]].

templates.headline: Grade 300: {subject} completes the ladder
templates.deck: Records desk special: the development file reaches its final page
templates.summary: {subject} reached development grade 300 — the top of the ladder.

sections.lead: There is a number that almost nobody reaches, because reaching it requires nearly everything: seasons of them, in cars good and bad, healthy and hurt, on afternoons that rewarded and afternoons that only taught. {subject} has reached grade 300. The ladder has no further rungs.
sections.context: Grade 300 is not a lap-time; it is the record of a career's whole education. The stopwatch still has to be convinced every Sunday[[?team: — {team} will see to that]].
sections.stats: Three hundred grades, earned across every season entered. The record keepers checked the arithmetic twice; the arithmetic held.

templates.headline: The ladder ends: {subject} at grade 300
templates.summary: The development ledger records its maximum grade for {subject}.

sections.lead: The records desk stamps a page it rarely touches: grade 300, the ceiling of the development ledger, now carries {subject}'s name. Whatever is learned from here belongs to legend, not to the file.

templates.headline: {subject} returns to the grid[[?venue: at {venue}]]
templates.deck: Medical desk: cleared to race[[?missRaces: after {missRaces} missed]]
templates.summary: {subject} made a racing return[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?missRaces: after missing {missRaces}]].

sections.lead: The entry list carries a restored name: {subject} is back[[?venue: at {venue}]][[?missRaces: after {missRaces} rounds watched from elsewhere]]. The medical staff signed the clearance; the grid will conduct its own examination at lights out.
sections.next: Rhythm is the last thing to heal. The first stint tells the truth about the rest[[?expected: — the pit wall pencils in P{expected} and hopes to be embarrassed]].
sections.close: The seat was never anyone else's. It only waited.

templates.headline: The road back: {subject}'s comeback weekend
templates.deck: Feature, season {season}: a recovery measured in race distance
templates.summary: A feature on {subject}'s return from injury[[?missRaces: after {missRaces} missed rounds]].

sections.lead: Recoveries happen off camera: the stiff mornings, the patient physios, the calendar pages that go by with someone else's engine note in them. {subject}'s ended this weekend, where recoveries are actually finished — on the entry list[[?venue: at {venue}]].
sections.impact: [[?missRaces:{missRaces} rounds went unraced. ]]The championship arithmetic took its toll and does not apologise; comebacks are paid for in points already lost.

templates.headline: The full distance: {subject}'s campaign is complete
templates.deck: Career retrospective: every season entered, the final one closed

sections.lead: Championships are won in a season; careers are won across all of them. {subject} has taken a campaign the full distance[[?milestone: — {milestone} seasons from first entry to final flag]]. The paddock does not applaud often; it did today.
sections.stats: The ledgers now close: starts, wins, the seasons of them — frozen where they stand, argument material forever.
sections.impact: Grids renew themselves; the standard this career set does not leave with it.

templates.headline: Campaign complete: the record closes on {subject}
templates.deck: Records card: the final season is filed
templates.summary: The campaign record for {subject} is complete and archived.

sections.lead: The final season's file joins the rest, and for the first time the drawer closes flush: {subject}'s campaign is complete. Nothing further will be added; everything already there will be argued about indefinitely.
